title: Canonical Schema and Temporal Authority Hardening
description: Harden Enki's canonical schema so historical truth, current authority, temporal validity, supersession, revocation, consent, policy, migration, and recovery semantics remain explicit and reconstructable.
acceptance_criteria: Historical truth and current authority are represented separately across governed record families
Recorded, effective, superseded, revoked, consumed, and authority-valid time are explicit where applicable
Temporal ambiguity and unsupported overlap fail closed
Schema migration preserves exact lineage and deterministic reconstruction
Regression tests cover authority changes without historical rewriting

evidence.description: Implemented and tested the complete Sprint 31 temporal-authority contract and path matrix.
CI passed the Sprint 31 regression suite.
Runtime Coverage passed all declared temporal-authority paths.
Work Control Authority passed before evidence-bearing completion promotion.
